summary: Iteration 46 - Comprehensive responsive dashboard testing complete. All 5 dashboards (Producer, Admin, SuperAdmin, Customer, Influencer) verified for mobile-first responsive design. Mobile views show header, bottom nav, 2x2 stats grid. Desktop views show sidebar, full stats grid. One UI issue found: Seller AI Assistant button overlaps bottom navigation on mobile.

ui_bugs.issue: AI Assistant button (data-testid='seller-ai-toggle') overlaps and intercepts clicks on mobile bottom navigation
ui_bugs.details: The floating AI assistant button at bottom-right intercepts pointer events on the bottom navigation items, especially 'Pedidos' and 'Más' buttons

passed_tests: Producer Dashboard Mobile (390x844): Mobile header visible with back button
Producer Dashboard Mobile: Bottom nav with 5 items (Inicio, Productos, Pedidos, Tienda, Más)
Producer Dashboard Mobile: Health Score Hero visible with score 40/100
Producer Dashboard Mobile: Stats grid 2x2 layout (5 stat cards)
Producer Dashboard Mobile: Desktop sidebar hidden
Producer Dashboard Desktop (1920x800): Desktop sidebar visible with 7 nav items
Producer Dashboard Desktop: Full Health Score card with 5-column breakdown
Producer Dashboard Desktop: Stats grid 5 columns
Producer Dashboard Desktop: Mobile header and bottom nav hidden
Admin Dashboard Mobile: Mobile header with 'Admin Panel' title
Admin Dashboard Mobile: Bottom nav with 5 items (Inicio, Vendedores, Productos, Pedidos, Más)
Admin Dashboard Mobile: Stats grid 2x2 (Sellers, Products, Certificates, Orders)
Admin Dashboard Mobile: Charts visible (Sales per Day, Orders and Visits)
Admin Dashboard Desktop: Desktop sidebar with 8 nav items
Admin Dashboard Desktop: Stats grid 4 columns
Admin Dashboard Desktop: Full date range picker visible
Admin Dashboard Desktop: Two charts side by side
SuperAdmin Dashboard Mobile: Mobile header with Shield icon and 'Super Admin' title
SuperAdmin Dashboard Mobile: Bottom nav with 5 items (Admins, Usuarios, Contenido, Insights, Más)
SuperAdmin Dashboard Desktop: Desktop sidebar with Shield icon and 5 nav items
SuperAdmin Dashboard Desktop: Full admin management table

Customer Dashboard Mobile: Bottom nav with 5 items (Inicio, Pedidos, Tiendas, Perfil, AI)
Customer Dashboard Mobile: Stats grid 2x2
Customer Dashboard Desktop: Desktop sidebar with 5 nav items + Continue Shopping
Customer Dashboard Desktop: Stats displayed in row
Mobile nav active state: Correct green color (#2D5A27 / rgb(45, 90, 39))
CSS variable --ds-accent correctly set to #2D5A27
Desktop sidebar navigation: Click navigation working (Orders, Overview)
Bottom Sheet component: Opens when 'Más' clicked (when not blocked by AI button)
action_items: FIX: Adjust z-index or positioning of SellerAIAssistant button to not overlap mobile bottom navigation
SUGGESTION: Move AI assistant button higher on mobile or add padding to bottom nav area
critical_code_review_comments: ProducerLayoutResponsive.js: Mobile header, desktop sidebar, bottom nav correctly implemented with proper CSS classes
AdminLayoutResponsive.js: Responsive layout working correctly with proper breakpoints
SuperAdminLayoutResponsive.js: Shield icon visible in both mobile header and desktop sidebar
CustomerLayoutResponsive.js: 5 nav items correctly displayed in bottom nav
MobileBottomNav.js: Component properly styled with .mobile-bottom-nav class
BottomSheet.js: Swipeable bottom sheet with proper overlay and close functionality
StatCardMobile.js: Stat cards properly styled for mobile view
HealthScoreHero.js: Hero component with gradient background and breakdown grid
index.css: Mobile-first CSS with proper breakpoints (md:hidden, md:flex)
ISSUE: SellerAIAssistant component has z-index:50 which conflicts with bottom nav z-index:50
seed_data_creation: Created test admin user (testadmin@hispaloshop.com) and sessions for all user roles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified all responsive dashboard features. Key findings: 1) All dashboards have proper mobile-first responsive design with mobile header, bottom nav on mobile and desktop sidebar on desktop. 2) Stats grids adapt from 2x2 on mobile to 4-5 columns on desktop. 3) Health Score shows as Hero on mobile and Card on desktop. 4) Active nav state shows correct green color (#2D5A27). 5) ONE ISSUE: SellerAIAssistant button overlaps bottom navigation on mobile - needs z-index adjustment.
